page_title: About | Dr. C. Joscky Ibrahim AHO
meta_description: Discover the academic and professional background of Dr. C. Joscky Ibrahim AHO: teaching, research, strategic consulting and local development.
og_title: About | Dr. C. Joscky Ibrahim AHO
og_description: Academic background, professional experience and strategic vision of Dr. C. Joscky Ibrahim AHO.
twitter_title: About | Dr. C. Joscky Ibrahim AHO
twitter_description: Academic background, professional experience and strategic vision.
hero_img_alt: Portrait of Dr. C. Joscky Ibrahim AHO
hero_subtitle:
Researcher and Lecturer in Anglophone African Studies
Expert in Marketing, Management and Local Development
hero_text_1: I am Dr. C. Joscky Ibrahim AHO, academic researcher, training consultant and expert in business administration. For over nineteen years, I have dedicated my career to higher education, professional training and the strategic support of organizations across West Africa.
hero_text_2: My academic and professional journey lies at the intersection of social sciences, management and regional integration dynamics. Holder of a PhD in Anglophone African Studies with a specialization in regional integration, I am also pursuing a second doctorate in business administration, driven by a commitment to continuous growth.
hero_text_3: Over the years, I have developed deep expertise across several key areas: strategic marketing, institutional communication, organizational management and results-based management. My work and interventions focus on socio-economic development challenges, project governance and organizational transformation in African contexts.
hero_text_4: Alongside my academic activities, I serve as a lead consultant for public institutions, international organizations and private enterprises. I support the design and implementation of development, communication and resource mobilization strategies, while contributing to the capacity building of institutional actors.
hero_text_5: I have also led major assignments in strategic marketing, project monitoring and evaluation, and training engineering, with a constant focus on the concrete and lasting impact of the actions undertaken.
hero_text_6: My commitment also translates into strong involvement in the training of young talents and skills development, through the delivery of academic and professional programs across several African countries. Convinced of the central role of knowledge in societal transformation, I strive to promote an integrated approach to development, grounded in knowledge, innovation and regional cooperation.
academic_section_subtitle: My academic journey has been built at the crossroads of social sciences, management and regional integration dynamics, with a constant drive to connect research to action.
academic_phd1_degree: PhD in Business Administration — Regional Integration
academic_phd1_description: I am currently conducting research focused on regional integration and the performance of multinational enterprises within the framework of the African Continental Free Trade Area (AfCFTA).
academic_phd2_degree: PhD in Anglophone African Studies — Regional Integration
academic_phd2_description: My research examined Nigeria's role within ECOWAS and the dynamics of regional integration in West Africa.
academic_dea1_degree: Advanced Studies Diploma (DEA) in Development Sociology
academic_dea2_degree: Advanced Studies Diploma (DEA) in Anglophone African Studies
academic_master1_degree: Professional Master's in Regional Integration — Local Development
academic_bts_degree: Higher Technician Certificate (BTS) — Marketing and Commercial Actions
professional_section_subtitle: My professional career has been built around three major pillars: teaching, strategic consulting and project management, at both national and international levels.
professional_teaching_institution: Universities, higher education schools and training institutes (Benin, Niger, Côte d'Ivoire, Togo, Ghana, Nigeria)
professional_teaching_li1: I design and deliver courses in academic and professional English, strategic marketing, organizational management and regional integration.
professional_teaching_li2: I provide academic supervision, student assessment and support for professional integration.
professional_teaching_li3: I also facilitate professional seminars and training programs focused on personal development and leadership.
professional_teaching_li4: I actively participate in academic juries and institutional deliberation processes.
professional_rcg_institution: Rainbow Consulting Group (RCG) and various training programs
professional_rcg_li1: I design and manage professional training programs, including initiatives such as English for Children and other sector-specific training courses.
professional_rcg_li2: I recruit, train and supervise trainer teams, maintaining consistently high pedagogical standards.
professional_rcg_li3: I develop modules, learning materials and assessment tools tailored to learners' needs.
professional_rcg_li4: I conduct program monitoring and evaluation and ensure continuous field-level improvement.
professional_translation_institution: Port Autonome de Cotonou, Ivey Business School (Canada), Ministry of Economy and Finance (Benin)
professional_translation_li1: I provide translation of institutional, administrative and scientific documents in demanding contexts.
professional_translation_li2: I deliver simultaneous interpretation at international seminars on finance, governance and development.
professional_translation_li3: I supervise translator teams and coordinate high-value linguistic missions.
professional_marketing_degree: Marketing and Communication Expert / Mission Leader
professional_marketing_institution: Communauté des Communes des Lagunes Côtières (CCLC) & Lux Smart Money
professional_marketing_li1: I developed communication and institutional marketing strategies tailored to field realities.
professional_marketing_li2: I organized and facilitated a strategic roundtable dedicated to resource mobilization.
professional_marketing_li3: I contributed to the mobilization of funding estimated at 10 billion FCFA.
professional_marketing_li4: I produced a structured mapping of technical and financial partners (TFPs) to strengthen visibility and effectiveness.
professional_iuma_institution: IUMA / BELT – Port Autonome de Cotonou & IRSP (ENABEL Project)
professional_iuma_li1: I designed applied technical English training programs (maritime, finance, marketing, legal).
professional_iuma_li2: I led training sessions for administrative and technical staff with a results-oriented approach.
professional_iuma_li3: I ensured the operational management of programs and pedagogical supervision across all activities.
professional_uac_degree: Missions Officer / Head of Social Dialogue
professional_uac_li1: I contributed to defining and implementing institutional communication strategies with strong internal reach.
professional_uac_li2: I managed social dialogue with student organizations in a spirit of stability and consultation.
professional_uac_li3: I designed mediation and conflict resolution mechanisms adapted to university realities.
professional_uac_li4: I provided strategic support for governance actions and institutional decisions.
professional_lid_institution: LID Management Consulting Firm & Pacific Consulting Group
professional_lid_li1: I conducted organizational diagnostics and supported structures in their strategic development.
professional_lid_li2: I participated in the development of growth plans and financing mechanisms.
professional_lid_li3: I trained executives in management and strategic marketing with a practical, performance-oriented approach.
professional_lid_li4: I contributed to improving organizational performance and strengthening management control.
professional_yic_institution: YIC Consulting Group & University of Abomey-Calavi
professional_yic_li1: I participated in developing communication and marketing strategies tailored to institutional structures.
professional_yic_li2: I contributed to university governance and certain internal reform processes.
professional_yic_li3: I took part in the organization and supervision of university elections.
professional_yic_li4: I coordinated several student and institutional initiatives in a dynamic of structuring and engagement.
vision_section_subtitle: My vision rests on the transmission of knowledge, the transformation of organizations and the building of sustainable development rooted in African realities.
vision_teaching_text1: I advocate for active pedagogy, oriented toward the development of practical and analytical skills, enabling learners to adapt to the demands of the job market and the constant shifts in professional environments.
vision_teaching_text2: For me, teaching is not merely a transfer of knowledge: it is a strategic lever for social transformation. It must strengthen autonomy, critical thinking and academic excellence within an evolving African context.
vision_research_text1: I pursue applied research centered on regional integration dynamics, organizational governance and socio-economic development challenges in Africa.
vision_research_text2: I firmly believe that research must produce useful knowledge, directly actionable by public decision-makers, businesses and institutions, in order to support truly effective policies and strategies.
vision_consulting_title: My vision of consulting and expertise
vision_consulting_text1: I support organizations in defining and implementing high-performing strategies, integrating dimensions of communication, marketing and results-based management.
vision_consulting_text2: For me, expertise only has value when it becomes a tool for impact. It must sustainably improve institutional performance and strengthen the capacities of stakeholders.
vision_development_text1: I believe in inclusive and sustainable development, based on the valorization of local resources, the strengthening of human capacities and regional cooperation.
vision_development_text2: Regional integration and collaboration between public and private actors are, in my view, essential levers for addressing the economic and social challenges of the African continent.
vision_quote: "I place knowledge, expertise and innovation at the service of sustainable, inclusive and sovereign development in Africa."
cta_section_subtitle: Discover my research, publications and collaborations.
cta_publications_text: Browse my scientific publications and contributions on marketing, regional integration and development.
cta_contact_text: Let's discuss your training, research or strategic consulting projects.
